recommendations.title: The Opposite of Sex
recommendations.overview: A 16-year-old girl visits her gay half-brother and ends up seducing his boyfriend, thus wreaking havoc on all of their lives.

recommendations.overview: Beth, a bookish teenager, befriends Emilia, an aspiring novelist who has just arrived in town. Emilia soon begins an affair with Beth's father that threatens to have devastating consequences.

recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Kill Your Darlings
recommendations.overview: A murder in 1944 draws together the great poets of the beat generation: Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs.
